checks.name: middleware-no-in-memory-rate-limit
checks.detail: apps/web/middleware.ts should not own correctness-critical rate limiting.

checks.name: legacy-search-no-refresh-on-read
checks.detail: siteSearch warm path must stay deprecated and search must not trigger freshness sync.

checks.name: legacy-search-warm-is-no-op
checks.detail: legacy /api/search warm path is retained only as a backward-compatible entrypoint.

checks.name: legacy-subscription-no-reconcile-on-read
checks.detail: legacy /api/me/subscription must not trigger Stripe reconciliation on read.

checks.name: billing-summary-no-reconcile-on-read
checks.detail: shared billing summary reads must not reconcile Stripe synchronously.

checks.name: durable-rate-limit-applied-at-routes
checks.detail: public and tokenized routes should use the durable DB-backed rate-limit helper.
